title: ARTICLE 2.1.
doc_html:
ARTICLE II.  DISTRIBUTION OF POWERS

§1.  Three Branches

Section 1.  The powers of government of the state are divided into three separate branches: legislative, executive, and judicial.
doc_text:
ARTICLE II.  DISTRIBUTION OF POWERS
§1.  Three Branches
Section 1.  The powers of government of the state are divided into three separate branches: legislative, executive, and judicial.
